title: praxelis pauciflora
intro: Praxelis pauciflora, also known as Mexican false buttonbush, is a shrub native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Praxelis pauciflora include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from gastrointestinal issues. Praxelis pauciflora can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
